blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Timeout-specific failure coverage was not present in the runnable validation subset, so the full contract assertion cannot be marked pass.

Blocked because the current runnable validation surface does not perform a real rotation or background/resume flow during connection setup on the shared emulator; the available composable hide/show recreation proof is not equivalent enough to claim this lifecycle assertion.
Blocked because secret-replacement behavior is not covered by the available runnable validation surface, so the full assertion cannot be claimed end to end.
Blocked because the available executable proof confirms remote command execution but not the full visible typed-input path required by this assertion.
Blocked because the only runnable scrollback proof uses scripted transcript data instead of long/multiline output from the real SSH target required by the contract.
Blocked because the current executable surface lacks the manual/live remote-output proof required for this scrollback-to-live assertion.
Blocked because runnable evidence covers only a single paste path and does not cover copy-out or multiline paste as required by the assertion.
Blocked because the current runnable validation surface has no soft-keyboard visibility proof for the terminal.
Blocked because there is no runnable rotation proof for an active live terminal session.
Blocked because the current executable validation surface does not perform background/resume testing for a live terminal session.
Blocked because no runnable test currently induces a real remote-side or network disconnect against the live fixture session.
Blocked because the current executable surface does not provide process-death or activity-recreation proof for a real live session.
